Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.nModuleState
Variable.Description: Module status byte: 0x00=OFF, 0x01=ON, 0x11=Fault (from M_C_1)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.rActualVoltage
Variable.Description: Output voltage (V) — scaled from 0.1 V/bit by FB

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.rActualCurrent
Variable.Description: Output current (A) — scaled from 0.01 A/bit by FB

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.wFaultBits
Variable.Description: Fault / Warning bit-field (WORD, bytes 5–6 of M_C_1)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.nPfcFaultBits
Variable.Description: PFC fault status byte (byte 7 of M_C_1)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.wStatusBits
Variable.Description: Detailed module status bit-field (bytes 1–2 of M_C_4)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.wExtFaultWarningBits
Variable.Description: Extended fault / warning bit-field (bytes 3–4 of M_C_4)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.rPhaseVoltageA
Variable.Description: AC input A-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.rPhaseVoltageB
Variable.Description: AC input B-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.rPhaseVoltageC
Variable.Description: AC input C-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.nTemperature
Variable.Description: Ambient temperature inside module (°C)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.bModuleRunning
Variable.Description: TRUE while state machine is in RUNNING or RAMPING state

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.bModuleFault
Variable.Description: TRUE when a fault condition is latched

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.bAckReceived
Variable.Description: TRUE after M_C_2 acknowledged the last command

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.sStatusText
Variable.Description: Human-readable state machine status message

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.eControlState
Variable.Description: Internal state machine state (mapped from E_ModuleState enum)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.nRampCurrentVoltage
Variable.Description: Current ramp voltage in raw units (0.1 V/bit) during soft-start

Variable.Name: MAIN.stStatus.bRampComplete
Variable.Description: TRUE when soft-start ramp has reached the target voltage

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.bEnableModule
Variable.Description: Rising edge: start module (send C_M_24 = 0xAA)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.bDisableModule
Variable.Description: Rising edge: stop module (send C_M_24 = 0x55)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.bClearFault
Variable.Description: Rising edge: clear fault flags and reset state machine

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.bUpdateSetpoint
Variable.Description: Rising edge: push new V/I setpoints to module while running

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.nTargetVoltage
Variable.Description: Voltage setpoint (0.1 V/bit, e.g. 5000 = 500.0 V)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.nTargetCurrent
Variable.Description: Current setpoint (0.01 A/bit, e.g. 4100 = 41.00 A)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.nModuleAddress
Variable.Description: Target module CAN address (1–240)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.nMasterAddress
Variable.Description: Master controller address (fixed 0xA0 per TONHE protocol)

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.bEnableRamp
Variable.Description: Enable soft-start voltage ramp on next module start

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.nRampVoltageStep
Variable.Description: Ramp step size in raw units (0.1 V/bit), e.g. 100 = 10 V per step

Variable.Name: MAIN.stSettings.tRampStepTime
Variable.Description: Time between ramp steps in milliseconds (TwinCAT TIME stored as DWORD ms)

Variable.Name: MAIN.fbComm.bStatusReceived
Variable.Description: Pulsed TRUE each time a fresh M_C_1 status frame is received

Variable.Name: MAIN.fbComm.nRxFrameCount
Variable.Description: Total CAN frames received since PLC start

Variable.Name: MAIN.fbComm.nLastRxCobId
Variable.Description: CAN ID (COB-ID) of the last received frame

Variable.Name: MAIN.fbModule.nRetryCount
Variable.Description: Current retry counter for ACK acknowledgment attempts

Variable.Name: MAIN.fbModule.nMaxRetries
Variable.Description: Maximum permitted retries before transitioning to FAULT
